summary: Completed comprehensive testing of pricing UI sync between Landing Page pricing section and Settings Billing page. Verified shared PricingCards component reusability and visual consistency.
passed_tests: Pricing page displays 3 plan cards: Starter ($0), Pro ($10), Growth ($25)
Pricing page Monthly/Annual toggle switches prices correctly
Pricing page Pro card has 'Most Popular' badge with star icon
Pricing page trust badges display at bottom (Cancel anytime, No credit card required, etc.)
Settings Billing tab shows same pricing cards as pricing page
Settings Billing has Current Plan banner showing active plan (Starter) with Active badge
Settings Billing: Starter card shows 'Current Plan' disabled button (green) with Active badge
Settings Billing: Pro card shows 'Upgrade to Pro' button
Settings Billing: Growth card shows 'Upgrade to Growth' button
Settings Billing has functional Monthly/Annual toggle
Settings Billing trust badges match pricing page
Shared PricingCards component at /components/pricing/PricingCards.tsx is properly reused
Pricing page and billing page have identical card layout, typography, spacing
Navigation between pricing page and settings billing tab works smoothly
